contentPattern.structure: grid of cards; each card = image/icon + heading + description + optional CTA

suitableFor: amenity / feature grids (icon + title + short text)
featured-hotel card grids (image + eyebrow + title + description + CTA)
notSuitableFor: single side-by-side image + text units (use columns-feature)

implementationNotes: Used for sections 5 (3 location tiles), 7 (10 amenity items) and 9 (6 featured-hotel cards). Project-native (init(el)) - does NOT import aem.js/moveInstrumentation (which do not exist in this project). Each block row becomes a card <li>; a picture-only first cell becomes cards-feature-card-image, other cells become cards-feature-card-body with a trailing link paragraph promoted to cards-feature-card-cta.
